title: [WIP][non-record] 8L/448 width branch local results
body:
## Summary

Non-record / WIP submission to `records/track_10min_16mb/` from local 1xGPU research.

Main finding so far:
- `8L / 448` width beat my stronger `9L / 384` depth branch locally
- best exact roundtrip so far: `val_bpb = 1.41200403` (seed 42)
- TTT helps modestly on the winner family, but width placement is the dominant gain

## Included
- README
- submission.json
- train logs
- train_gpt.py snapshot

## Notes
This is not a SOTA claim. I am using this PR as a public WIP research submission and compute-grant reference while continuing official-track experiments.
